title: festuca ovina subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. tenuifolia, also known as slender sheep's fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subsp. tenuifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
